channel.title: Pages on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on LiaScript

item.title: WorldMap
item.description: Since LiaScript is a distributed approach to create and share educational content, it is difficult to keep track of all the projects that are created with it. This is why we have created a world map that shows the locations of projects that have been implemented with LiaScript so far.

item.title: Community Graph
item.description: An interactive network graph that visualizes the relationships between contributors, repositories, and documents in the LiaScript open-source community. It maps users, super-users, repositories, and doc hubs as a force-directed graph, with org clusters grouping contributors by GitHub organization.

item.title: Atom - Editor
item.description: Although, the Atom editor is not actively maintained anymore, it is still a great editor for writing Markdown documents. Especially if your are dealing with very large documents, the Atom editor outperforms other editors like VS-Code. We still use the Atom editor for our documentation:

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Get in touch with us via …

  • Gitter: https://app.gitter.im/#/room/#LiaScript_community:gitter.im
  • Twitter: https://twitter.com/LiaScript
  • GitHub: https://github.com/LiaScript
  • Email: LiaScript@web.de
  • YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@liascript4180

item.title: Development - Server
item.description: If you want to use another of your preferred editors, you can also install the development server. By running it you can point it to any of your projects and it will deliver a preview the project for you in the browser.

item.title: Exporter
item.description: A generic LiaScript-Exporter that converts educational content into different formats, so that LiaScript courses can be used in Learning Management Systems (LMS) or as static documents (PDF, ePub, DOCX, …). Supported formats: SCORM 1.2, SCORM 2004, IMS, xAPI, Web, PDF, ePub, DOCX, Android, Project, RDF.

item.title: Imprint
item.description:
Publisher

Technische Universität Bergakademie Freiberg

Akademiestraße 6
09599 Freiberg, Germany
Phone: +49 3731 39-0
Fax: +49 3731 39-3323
Email: universitaet@tu-freiberg.de

item.title: Live - Editor
item.description: The LiveEditor is an entirely browser-based collaborative Editor. It covers nearly all functionalities of other server-based solutions, but in this case, you don’t need a server nor a login. All your notes or courses will be directly stored within your browser.

item.title: Newsletter Subscription
item.description:

item.title: VSCode - Editor
item.description:
Installation

To install VSCode with LiaScript follow the steps from the following Blog-post.

item.title: VSCode-Web - Editor
item.description: This is a preview module for LiaScript courses developed for the VSCode-Web editor, thus no installation everything is browser-based. If you have a GitHub-account simply follow the steps in the video below to for installation:
